package.name: autodriver_cmake
package.description:
Shared CMake modules for the autodriver ROS2 workspace. Provides: - AutodriverCompilerOptions.cmake (shared compiler flags) - FindAutodriverCUDA.cmake (Jetson-aware CUDA detection, Autodriver::CUDA target) - FindNvBufSurface.cmake (NVIDIA NvBufSurface imported target) - FindTensorRT.cmake (TensorRT 10 imported targets)
After find_package(autodriver_cmake REQUIRED), all modules are available via CMAKE_MODULE_PATH without additional configuration.
